services.title: Maintenance & Support

howWeWork.title: Discovery
howWeWork.description: We dive deep into your requirements, target audience, and business goals.

howWeWork.title: Architecture
howWeWork.description: Planning the technical stack, system design, and project roadmap.

howWeWork.title: Development
howWeWork.description: Agile execution with regular sprints, code reviews, and transparent updates.

howWeWork.title: Testing
howWeWork.description: We conduct rigorous testing to ensure functionality, performance, and security before deployment.

howWeWork.title: Deployment & Support
howWeWork.description: Rigorous QA, deployment, and hand-off to ensure immediate value generation.

faq.title: What is a typical project timeline?
faq.description: Timelines vary depending on project complexity. A standard web application MVP typically takes 8-12 weeks, while enterprise ERP systems or complex mobile apps may require 4-6 months of development.

faq.title: How do you estimate cost?
faq.description: We provide transparent pricing based on project scope, required resources, and technical complexity. We offer both fixed-price contracts for well-defined scopes and time-and-materials arrangements for agile ongoing development.

faq.title: Do you provide ongoing maintenance?
faq.description: Yes, we offer comprehensive SLA-based maintenance packages that include security patching, dependency updates, performance monitoring, and bug fixes to keep your software running smoothly post-launch.

faq.title: Can you build mobile apps for both iOS and Android?
faq.description: Absolutely. We develop both native apps (using Swift and Kotlin) and cross-platform solutions (using frameworks like Flutter) to ensure optimal reach and performance across all major mobile operating systems.
